description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: build, test, and publish, and define the variable LEIN_ROOT='true'. In the build stage add a build-client job using the java:8-alpine image that runs `apk add --update wget ca-certificates bash`, `wget -q -O /usr/bin/lein https://raw.githubusercontent.com/technomancy/leiningen/stable/bin/lein`, `chmod +x /usr/bin/lein`, `lein cljsbuild once dev`, `lein cljsbuild once test`, and `([[ -n "${CI_BUILD_TAG}" ]] && lein cljsbuild once prod) || echo "prod skipped"`; it stores all generated *.js files as artifacts that expire after 1 day. In the test stage add a test-client job using the kkarczmarczyk/node-yarn:7.2-slim image that runs `yarn install` and `node pipeclient-test.js`. In the publish stage add a publish-npm job also using the kkarczmarczyk/node-yarn:7.2-slim image, limited to tag pipelines, that runs `echo "${NPM_AUTH}" > ~/.npmrc` and `npm publish ./ --access public --tag latest`. All jobs are tagged with the docker runner.
